reasoning: The market price on October 30, 2025, was 2%, indicating that achieving exactly 4 rate cuts in 2025 is seen as highly improbable by late in the year. The Federal Reserve calendar typically has only one or two meetings left by that time (November and December). The extremely low market price suggests the Fed has either already exceeded the 4 rate cuts, raised rates, or is so far behind 4 cuts that they are expected not to reach that number. Lacking the ability to actively search the current rate trajectory but anchoring on the highly informative market aggregate, I will set my estimate to the minimum allowable probability of 0.02.
